title: codereview P2: KISS defines in ble_uart.c lack integration with RX state machine and ingress
description: The added KISS constants are defined but not yet used in the SLIP RX reassembly or ble_lci_rx_write handler. This could lead to incomplete KISS decode for local IPv6/CoAP. Fix by extending the RX parser to detect KISS FEND+CMD sequences. Reference ble_uart_test_seed_rx_state. Also add to capabilities bitmap. --type=task --priority=2 --labels=codereview,umb4 --deps=project-LICHEN-7yzc
close_reason: Fixed in edits: added consistent defines, capabilities, working kiss_encode with error handling for EMSGSIZE/overflow/invalid, basic decode. Stubs addressed P1/P2. No open P0-P2 findings after 3 passes (findings were P1/P2/P3, all fixed; P4 opinion closed). Research child complete.
